items.title: Oracle is under pressure from more than $100 billion in debt and massive layoffs as it pushes ahead with Larry Ellison’s 3-step transformation
items.description: The Larry Ellison-led software giant is remaking its cloud infrastructure to rival Amazon and Microsoft.

items.title: Prediction: The Artificial Intelligence (AI) Pick-and-Shovel Trade Isn't Over. Here Are 2 Stocks to Buy for 2026
items.description: Artificial intelligence spending is only going up across the whole of the tech industry. These two companies stand to benefit from all of it.

items.title: Stock Market Today, March 9: Amazon Edges Higher on Zoox Robotaxi Expansion
items.description: Zoox's robotaxi rollout and delivery network spotlight Amazon’s evolving logistics and AI strategy, today, March 9, 2026.

items.title: The Agentic AI Market Could Grow 10X by 2030. This Stock Is Leading the Charge.
items.description: Microsoft's powerful artificial intelligence (AI) ecosystem can make it one of the biggest winners in the rapidly expanding agentic AI market.

items.title: 'Make Tech Value Again': This is software's 'only hope'
items.description: Portfolio Wealth Advisors president and chief investment officer Lee Munson chats with Yahoo Finance Markets and Data Editor Jared Blikre on the New York Stock Exchange floor to discuss the market's (^DJI, ^GSPC, ^IXIC) reaction to the Iran war, volatility (^VIX), and more. Watch the video above to learn about how tech stocks (XLK) could become value stocks, to hear what Munson wants to see from the software (IGV) sector, and what might be next for gold (GC=F). To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination.
